description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile Formula 1-style sports car with a predominantly black body accented by bold red stripes and aerodynamic contours. The car features a prominent front wing with multiple horizontal slats, a streamlined cockpit with a halo safety device, and large, exposed wheels with smooth, silver rims. The side profile reveals sculpted side pods and a low ground clearance, emphasizing its high-speed, performance-oriented design. At the rear, a large wing and intricate diffuser are visible, enhancing downforce and stability. The car's overall appearance is aggressive and modern, with a focus on speed and precision engineering. The materials and finish suggest a combination of lightweight composites and metals, typical of high-end racing vehicles.
description: A black and red Formula 1-style sports car with aerodynamic wings, exposed wheels, and a streamlined, aggressive design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide front wing, narrow nose, and cockpit with halo device.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the low profile, sculpted side pods, and large exposed wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large rear wing, diffuser, and wide rear tires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing aerodynamic lines and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke silver wheels with a smooth, aerodynamic finish
